title: Training a New Hire 培训新人

lines.en: Welcome aboard. I will be training you this week.
lines.zh: 欢迎加入。这周由我来培训你。

lines.en: Thank you. I am excited to learn.
First, let me show you how to use our internal system.
lines.zh: 首先，我教你如何使用我们的内部系统。

lines.en: Is it similar to the one I used at my old company?
lines.zh: 它和我以前公司用的系统类似吗？

lines.en: A little, but there are some differences. I will walk you through it.
lines.zh: 有一点，但有些地方不同。我会一步步教你。

lines.en: That would be great. Should I take notes?
lines.zh: 太好了。我需要做笔记吗？

lines.en: Yes, please do. It will help you remember the steps.
lines.zh: 是的，请记下来。这能帮你记住操作步骤。

lines.en: Got it. How long does the training usually take?
lines.zh: 明白了。培训通常需要多久？

lines.en: About three days. Then you will shadow me on real tasks.
lines.zh: 大约三天。然后你会跟着我实操。
